Loss Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident experienced a loss of interest or pleasure in doing things. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2 blank)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
